name: Kuto the Strange

sheet.name: Kuto the Strange
sheet.background_story:
Inn-keeper, story-teller. Easy-going follower of both Her and the Nameless One, thinking they are two halves of the same coin.

Following the disaster at the Artificer's Sanctum along the edge of the wound, Kuto gave up traveling with merchants and has taken stewardship of The Welcome Stranger Inn, for those in need of a warm meal or a roof over their head.
